code.heading: Code block example
code.text: The code component can be used to display a block of code with syntax highlighting. In this example the language parameter is defined as php.

with-description.heading: Code block with description
with-description.text: The content parameter adds a descriptive paragraph above the code block, giving context about what the code does.

html.heading: HTML code block
html.text: Setting escape to true HTML-encodes the slot content before output, allowing HTML markup to be displayed as literal code rather than rendered by the browser.

css.heading: CSS code block
css.text: The language parameter accepts any Prism.js language identifier, such as css, to apply the correct syntax highlighting.
